extracted.title: VCP Gas Quality Notification -- UPDATE
extracted.description:
Effective immediately, VCP is lifting the gas quality restrictions for MR 40832 - WHISTLER PIPELINE and 45813 - NGPL (DEL 40813/REC 40814). VCP will continue to monitor heating value for future gas days, if the heating value does not continue to meet VCP's SOC, future restrictions could be imposed.

Please contact your operations account representative should you have any questions.
